description: Equip a stone pickaxe before mining iron ore (wooden pickaxe cannot break iron ore). Tests !equip surfacing alongside !collectBlocks in collecting Top-K.
goal: Mine 1 raw_iron by equipping the stone pickaxe.
starting_prompt: There is iron ore nearby. You have a wooden pickaxe and a stone pickaxe in your inventory. A wooden pickaxe CANNOT mine iron ore — you must equip the stone pickaxe first, then mine the iron ore to collect raw iron.
